cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about a study by the World Bank in 1974 and what it concluded regarding economic growth in some developing countries. The passage says that the World Bank study found that more than decades of rapid growth in developing countries had been of little benefit to a third of their population. So the key part here is "little benefit to a third of their population." The question is asking what the economic growth brought according to the study. Looking at the options: A) benefit to a third of their population B) benefit to two thirds of their population C) little benefit to their people D) no benefit at all to their people The study specifically mentions "little benefit to a third of their population."
